_note: Auto-generated by scripts/generate-manifest.js. Do not edit manually.

account/address-book.description: Customer address book with add/edit form and saved address cards

standard.label: Standard Address Book
standard.description: Grid of address cards with inline add/edit form, country/region selectors

standard.label: Standard Auth Forms
standard.description: Traditional email/password forms with field validation

account/dashboard.description: Customer account dashboard with profile, password, wishlist, and reviews tabs

standard.label: Standard Dashboard
standard.description: Tabbed account dashboard with profile management, password change, wishlist, and reviews

account/orders.description: Order history list with detail view and pagination

standard.label: Standard Orders List
standard.description: Paginated order history with expandable order details

blog/card.description: Blog post card for use in grids, listings, and sidebar widgets

standard.label: Standard Blog Card
standard.description: Card with featured image, title, excerpt, date, author, and read-more link.

minimal.label: Minimal Blog Card
minimal.description: Text-only card without image. Title, date, and short excerpt in a clean layout.

blog/listing.description: Blog listing layout for index and archive pages

grid.label: Grid Layout
grid.description: Responsive grid of blog cards (1/2/3 columns). Uses the configured BlogCard variant.

list.label: List Layout
list.description: Vertical list with horizontal entries. Image left, content right. Good for archive pages.

cart/coupon-field.description: Coupon/discount code input field in cart

standard.label: Standard Coupon
standard.description: Collapsible input with apply button. Shows applied coupons as badges.

cart/drawer.description: Cart drawer that slides out when items are added

slide.label: Slide Panel
slide.description: Slides in from the right. Shows items, totals, and checkout button.

modal.label: Modal Overlay
modal.description: Centered modal showing cart contents. Less intrusive for content-heavy pages.

cart/line-item.description: Individual item row in the cart page

standard.label: Standard Line Item
standard.description: Horizontal layout with image, details, quantity stepper, and remove button.

standard.label: Standard Progress
standard.description: DaisyUI progress bar showing distance to free shipping threshold.

cart/summary.description: Cart totals summary with subtotal, shipping, and checkout CTA

standard.label: Standard Summary
standard.description: Stacked totals with prominent checkout button. Sticky on desktop.

category/banner-inline.description: Promotional banner injected between product rows in category grid

standard.label: Standard Inline Banner
standard.description: Full-width promo card with image-full pattern, ~3:1 aspect ratio on desktop, CTA button.

category/grid.description: Product grid layout on category pages

standard.label: Standard Grid
standard.description: Responsive CSS grid. 2 cols mobile, 3 tablet, 4 desktop (configurable).

list.label: List View
list.description: Vertical list with horizontal product cards. Shows more detail per product.

category/hero.description: Category page hero banner with title, description, and optional background image

standard.label: Standard Hero
standard.description: Full-width banner with category name, description, optional background image with dark overlay, and product count badge.

category/subcategory-tiles.description: Subcategory navigation tiles above the product grid

standard.label: Standard Tiles
standard.description: Horizontal scrollable row of subcategory tiles with images.

category/toolbar.description: Category toolbar with results count, view toggle, and sort

standard.label: Standard Toolbar
standard.description: Horizontal bar with product count, sort select, and grid/list toggle.

checkout/address-form.description: Shipping and billing address entry form

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Full address entry form with first/last name, company, street, city, state, postcode, country, and phone fields.

checkout/order-summary.description: Checkout order review and totals summary panel

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Right-side order summary with line items, thumbnails, and subtotal/shipping/tax/total breakdown.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Radio-based payment method selector with bordered cards that highlight when selected.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Horizontal step indicator using DaisyUI steps component with completed/active state tracking.

checkout/trust-badges.description: Checkout-specific trust and security indicator badges

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Centered row of trust indicators with lock, shield, and credit card icons for checkout reassurance.

cms/accordion-faq.description: Collapsible FAQ accordion for question and answer content

standard.label: Standard Accordion FAQ
standard.description: List of collapsible Q&A items using DaisyUI collapse with join container.

cms/callout.description: Tip, warning, note, and error callout boxes with icons

standard.label: Standard Callout
standard.description: Colored callout box with icon using DaisyUI alert classes.

cms/columns.description: Multi-column layouts for CMS content sections

two-column.label: Two Column
two-column.description: Two-column layout with configurable split ratio (50-50, 60-40, 40-60).

three-column.label: Three Column
three-column.description: Three equal columns, stacking to single column on mobile.

cms/image-text-split.description: Image alongside text content with optional CTA button

standard.label: Standard Image Text Split
standard.description: Image on one side, text content on the other with optional CTA. Responsive stacking.

cms/rich-text.description: WYSIWYG content wrapper with typography styling for CMS page content

standard.label: Standard Rich Text
standard.description: Prose container with proper typography classes for HTML content.

cms/video-embed.description: Responsive video embed wrapper for YouTube, Vimeo, and other iframe sources

standard.label: Standard Video Embed
standard.description: Responsive 16:9 iframe wrapper with rounded corners.

data/comparison-table.description: Side-by-side product comparison table with difference highlighting

standard.label: Standard Comparison Table
standard.description: Product images/names as column headers, spec rows below, differing values highlighted, sticky first column with horizontal scroll on mobile.

data/spec-table.description: Product specification table with grouped key-value rows

standard.label: Standard Spec Table
standard.description: Zebra-striped key-value table with optional group headers. Two columns: label (~40% width) and value.

data/stats-counter.description: Row of statistic counters with values and labels

row.label: Stats Counter Row
row.description: Horizontal stats row using DaisyUI stats component. Responsive: vertical on mobile, horizontal on desktop.

engagement/contact-form.description: Contact us form for customer enquiries

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Full contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields.

engagement/cookie-consent.description: Cookie consent notification bar for privacy compliance

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Fixed bottom bar with privacy message, Accept and Settings buttons.

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Simple bar with message and a single OK button, no settings.

engagement/newsletter.description: Newsletter signup forms for collecting email subscribers

inline.label: Inline
inline.description: Horizontal inline form with heading and description. Sits inside a page section.

popup.label: Popup Modal
popup.description: DaisyUI modal dialog shown after a configurable delay. Shows once per visitor.

flyout.label: Flyout
flyout.description: Small floating card that slides in from the bottom-right corner.

engagement/trust-badges.description: Trust indicator badges for building customer confidence

standard.label: Badge Row
standard.description: Horizontal row of trust badges with icons, titles, and optional descriptions. Wraps on mobile.

feedback/empty-state.description: Empty state display (no results, empty cart, no orders)

standard.label: Standard Empty State
standard.description: Centered icon, message, and CTA button. Used for empty cart, no search results, etc.

standard.label: Standard Error Page
standard.description: Centered error code, message, and 'Go Home' button.

standard.label: Standard Skeleton
standard.description: Animated pulse placeholder matching component dimensions. Prevents CLS.

standard.label: Standard Toast
standard.description: DaisyUI toast positioned bottom-right. Auto-dismisses after 3 seconds.

filtering/chip-bar.description: Active filter chips displayed above product grid

standard.label: Standard Chips
standard.description: Horizontal row of DaisyUI badges with remove buttons. Scrollable on mobile.

standard.label: Standard Pagination
standard.description: DaisyUI join group with numbered page buttons and prev/next arrows.

load-more.label: Load More Button
load-more.description: Single 'Load More' button that appends products. Simpler, mobile-friendly.

standard.label: Dual Slider
standard.description: Two-thumb range slider with min/max labels. Native HTML range inputs.

filtering/filter.description: Product filtering interface for category pages

sidebar.label: Sidebar Filters
sidebar.description: Left sidebar with collapsible filter groups. Desktop default, becomes drawer on mobile.

drawer.label: Drawer Filters
drawer.description: Full-height drawer that slides in from the left. Always off-canvas.

inline.label: Inline Filters
inline.description: Horizontal filter bar above products. Good for fewer filter options.

filtering/sort.description: Sort order selector for product listings

standard.label: Standard Select
standard.description: DaisyUI select dropdown with sort options (relevance, price, name, newest).

homepage/brand-logo-strip.description: Brand logo display section on the homepage

strip.label: Logo Strip (Marquee)
strip.description: Horizontal auto-scrolling marquee of brand logos. Grayscale by default, color on hover.

grid.label: Logo Grid
grid.description: Static grid layout of brand logos in 4-6 columns.

homepage/collection-spotlight.description: Featured collection or category showcase with product row

standard.label: Standard Spotlight
standard.description: Section header with scrollable product card row. Shows collection title and 'View All' link.

homepage/countdown-timer.description: Sale countdown timer banner for the homepage

standard.label: Standard Countdown
standard.description: Banner with countdown boxes showing days/hours/minutes/seconds, heading, subtext, and CTA link.

homepage/featured-products.description: Featured product row section for the homepage. Reusable for New Arrivals, Trending, Bestsellers — just different heading and data.

row.label: Scrolling Row
row.description: Horizontal scrolling row of product cards with section heading and View All link. Uses scroll-snap.

homepage/hero.description: Hero section at the top of the homepage

fullwidth.label: Full Width Hero
fullwidth.description: Edge-to-edge image/gradient with overlay text and CTA. High impact.

split.label: Split Hero
split.description: 50/50 split with content on one side and image on the other.

minimal.label: Minimal Hero
minimal.description: Text-focused with subtle background. Clean, editorial feel.

slideshow.label: Slideshow Hero
slideshow.description: Auto-rotating slides with different images and messages.

homepage/icon-features.description: Feature highlight cards with icons for the homepage (e.g. Free Shipping, Easy Returns, VIP Rewards)

row.label: Feature Row
row.description: Horizontal row of 3-4 feature cards with icon, title, and description.

grid.label: Feature Grid
grid.description: 2x2 grid layout for displaying more features.

homepage/promo-banner.description: Sitewide announcement banner at the top of the page

standard.label: Standard Banner
standard.description: Full-width colored bar with text and optional link. Dismissible.

homepage/promo-grid.description: Promotional content grid on the homepage

2up.label: Two Column
2up.description: Two equal-width promo cards side by side.

3up.label: Three Column
3up.description: Three equal-width promo cards. Default homepage layout.

4up.label: Four Column
4up.description: Four cards across. Compact, good for many promos.

homepage/promo-strip.description: Horizontal row of icon + text feature callouts (shipping, returns, support)

standard.label: Standard Strip
standard.description: 4-column grid of icon + text feature highlights. Responsive 2-col on mobile.

homepage/shop-by-category.description: Category navigation tiles on the homepage

tiles.label: Category Tiles
tiles.description: Grid of category cards with images and titles. Links to category pages.

standard.label: Standard Breadcrumb
standard.description: Horizontal breadcrumb with separator arrows. Truncates long names on mobile.

navigation/footer.description: Site footer with branding, links, newsletter, and copyright

standard.label: Standard Footer
standard.description: 4-column layout with newsletter, link columns, and copyright bar. Full-featured.

minimal.label: Minimal Footer
minimal.description: Single row with copyright and social icons. Maximum simplicity.

centered.label: Centered Footer
centered.description: Centered logo, horizontal nav links, social icons, and copyright. Brand-focused.

mega.label: Mega Footer
mega.description: Two-row footer: logo + columns + newsletter on top, social + copyright on bottom. Content-rich.

navigation/header.description: Site header with logo, navigation, search, and cart

sticky.label: Sticky Header
sticky.description: Fixed header that stays visible on scroll. Compact with dropdown nav. Default.

minimal.label: Minimal Header
minimal.description: Centered logo, uppercase nav links, thin icon strokes. Editorial/fashion feel.

centered.label: Centered Header
centered.description: Two-tier: utility bar on top, centered logo, nav bar below. Premium/luxury.

standard.label: Standard Drawer
standard.description: Full-height slide-out drawer with accordion category navigation.

standard.label: Standard Badge
standard.description: DaisyUI badge positioned top-left of product image. Colored by type.

product-display/card.description: Product card shown in grids, search results, and recommendations

standard.label: Standard Card
standard.description: Vertical card with image, title, price, and quick-add button. DaisyUI card with shadow hover.

minimal.label: Minimal Card
minimal.description: Clean card without shadows or borders. Image + text only, modern aesthetic.

horizontal.label: Horizontal Card
horizontal.description: Side-by-side image and content. Good for list view or search results.

featured.label: Featured Card
featured.description: Larger, prominent card for hero/spotlight positions. Bigger image, rating stars, sale badge with savings percentage, and Quick Add button.

product-display/gallery.description: Product image gallery on the product detail page

carousel.label: Carousel with Thumbnails
carousel.description: Swipeable main image with thumbnail strip below. Supports fullscreen zoom. Best for products with many images.

grid.label: Image Grid
grid.description: 2-column grid showing all images at once. Click to zoom. Best for showing multiple angles.

single.label: Single Image
single.description: One large image with thumbnails. Clean and minimal. Best for simple products.

product-display/product-info-panel.description: Product information panel with title, price, options, and add-to-cart

compact.label: Compact
compact.description: Slim sidebar-friendly panel. Title, price, stock, options, add-to-cart in a narrow column.

product-display/layout.description: Product page layout — gallery and info arrangement

standard.label: Standard 50/50
standard.description: Equal two-column layout. Gallery left (carousel), product info right. Description/reviews below as full-width sections.

masonry.label: Masonry Gallery + Slim Sidebar
masonry.description: Wide masonry image grid left (~65%), slim product info right (~35%). Description/reviews/related as accordion below the sidebar.

standard.label: Standard Price
standard.description: Shows current price with strikethrough for sale items. Compact inline display.

stacked.label: Stacked Price
stacked.description: Vertical layout with 'Was/Now' labels. More prominent sale display.

standard.label: Standard Stepper
standard.description: DaisyUI join group with -/+ buttons flanking the quantity input.

product-display/recently-viewed.description: Recently viewed products section populated from localStorage via client-side JS

row.label: Horizontal Row
row.description: Horizontal scrollable row of recently viewed product cards. Client-side populated from localStorage.

product-display/sticky-atc.description: Sticky add-to-cart bar that appears on scroll past the main product actions

standard.label: Standard Sticky Bar
standard.description: Fixed bottom bar with product name, price, and Add to Cart button. Slides up on scroll.

product-display/stock-indicator.description: Stock availability display on product page

standard.label: Standard Stock
standard.description: Text with colored dot indicator. Green for in-stock, red for out-of-stock.

product-display/tabs.description: Product info tabs (description, specs, reviews, shipping)

tabbed.label: Tabbed
tabbed.description: DaisyUI tabs with underline style. Standard horizontal tabs below product info.

accordion.label: Accordion
accordion.description: Collapsible accordion sections. Better for mobile, shows all section titles at once.

swatch.label: Visual Swatches
swatch.description: Circular color swatches and button-style size selectors. Most visual option.

dropdown.label: Dropdown Selects
dropdown.description: Standard select dropdowns. Compact, works well for many options.

button.label: Button Group
button.description: Pill-style buttons in a row. Good for size selection with few options.

product-utility/compare.description: Product comparison components for side-by-side spec comparison

tray.label: Compare Tray
tray.description: Fixed bottom tray showing selected products with thumbnails and a Compare button.

table.label: Compare Table
table.description: Full comparison table with product images as column headers and spec rows.

product-utility/delivery-date.description: Estimated delivery date display with truck icon

standard.label: Delivery Date Standard
standard.description: Inline delivery estimate with green truck icon and estimated date text.

product-utility/notify-me.description: Back in stock notification signup for out-of-stock products

standard.label: Notify Me Standard
standard.description: Inline email form shown when a product is out of stock. Uses DaisyUI fieldset pattern.

product-utility/shipping-estimator.description: Shipping cost and delivery date estimator with postcode entry

standard.label: Shipping Estimator Standard
standard.description: Inline postcode entry with join input group pattern. Shows shipping methods and costs.

product-utility/size-guide.description: Product size guide display with measurements and sizing information

table.label: Size Guide Table
table.description: Standard table-based size guide with zebra striping and horizontal scroll.

visual.label: Visual Size Guide
visual.description: Visual body/racket diagram with measurement list displayed side by side.

modal.label: Size Guide Modal
modal.description: Table-based size guide wrapped in a DaisyUI modal dialog with trigger button.

product-utility/wishlist-button.description: Wishlist/favorites toggle button for adding products to a wishlist

standard.label: Wishlist Button Standard
standard.description: Heart icon toggle button with ghost circle styling. Outlined when inactive, filled when active.

reviews/rating-summary.description: Star rating breakdown display showing overall rating and per-star distribution

standard.label: Standard Rating Summary
standard.description: Large overall rating with stars, horizontal bar breakdown by star level, and total review count.

reviews/review-list.description: List of customer product reviews with ratings, text, and metadata

standard.label: Standard Review List
standard.description: Vertical stack of review cards with name, date, star rating, title, body, and verified badge.

compact.label: Compact Review List
compact.description: Condensed inline layout — no title, shorter body text, tighter spacing.

reviews/social-proof.description: Social proof indicators showing trust signals and store statistics

strip.label: Social Proof Strip
strip.description: Thin horizontal bar with icon-text stat items like customer count, average rating, and return policy.

reviews/testimonial.description: Marketing testimonial displays with customer quotes and attribution

carousel.label: Testimonial Carousel
carousel.description: Horizontal scrolling testimonial cards with scroll-snap. Quote, author name, and optional role/image.

overlay.label: Search Overlay
overlay.description: Full-screen overlay with large search input and predictive results.

inline.label: Inline Search
inline.description: Search bar in the header with dropdown results panel.

standard.label: Standard Results
standard.description: Grid of product cards with search summary and sort options.
